sentences.target: Ich helfe der Touristin mit dem Stadtplan.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhɛlfə deːɐ̯ tuˈʁɪstɪn mɪt deːm ˈʃtatplaːn/

translations.de: Ich helfe der Touristin mit dem Stadtplan.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhɛlfə deːɐ̯ tuˈʁɪstɪn mɪt deːm ˈʃtatplaːn/
translations.en: I’m helping the tourist with the city map.
translations.es: Estoy ayudando a la turista con el mapa de la ciudad.
translations.fr: J’aide la touriste avec le plan de la ville.
translations.it: Sto aiutando la turista con la mappa della città.
translations.ko: 관광객에게 지도로 길을 안내해 주고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在帮那位女游客看地图。
translations.yue: 我喺度幫嗰位女遊客睇地圖。
translations.ru: Я помогаю туристке с картой города.
translations.pt: Estou ajudando a turista com o mapa da cidade.
translations.he: אני עוזר לתיירת עם מפת העיר.
translations.vi: Tôi đang giúp du khách xem bản đồ thành phố.
translations.ar: أنا أساعد السائحة باستخدام خريطة المدينة.
translations.nl: Ik help de toeriste met de stadsplattegrond.
translations.uk: Я допомагаю туристці з мапою міста.
translations.hi: मैं पर्यटक को शहर का नक्शा दिखाकर मदद कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Βοηθάω την τουρίστρια με τον χάρτη της πόλης.
translations.id: Saya sedang membantu turis dengan peta kota.
translations.ro: O ajut pe turistă cu harta orașului.
translations.ja: 観光客に地図で道を教えています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; governs a dative object ('der Touristin') and the prepositional phrase 'mit dem Stadtplan' indicating means.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner for 'Touristin'.
Common noun, feminine, dative singular; indirect object (recipient) required by 'helfen'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces an instrument/means PP.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; determiner for 'Stadtplan'.
Common noun, masculine, dative singular; object of the preposition 'mit' indicating instrument.

sentences.target: Die Touristin fragt nach dem Weg.

translations.de: Die Touristin fragt nach dem Weg.
translations.en: The tourist is asking for directions.
translations.el: Η τουρίστρια ρωτάει για τον δρόμο.
translations.ja: 観光客が道を尋ねています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner for the subject 'Touristin'.
Common noun, feminine, nominative singular; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; takes the prepositional complement 'nach' to mark the queried topic.
Preposition governing dative; forms a fixed verb–preposition pattern with 'fragen' to indicate the information sought.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; determiner for 'Weg'.
Common noun, masculine, dative singular; object of the preposition 'nach' (topic of the question).

sentences.target: Da kommt eine Touristin aus Spanien.

translations.de: Da kommt eine Touristin aus Spanien.
translations.en: A tourist is coming from Spain.
translations.es: Ahí viene una turista de España.
translations.fr: Voilà une touriste qui arrive d’Espagne.
translations.it: Ecco che arriva una turista dalla Spagna.
translations.zh-Hans: 有位来自西班牙的女游客过来了。
translations.yue: 有位嚟自西班牙嘅女遊客過嚟喇。
translations.pt: Lá vem uma turista da Espanha.
translations.vi: Một du khách từ Tây Ban Nha đang đến.
translations.ar: ها هي سائحة قادمة من إسبانيا.
translations.nl: Daar komt een toerist uit Spanje.
translations.hi: स्पेन से एक पर्यटक आ रही है.
translations.el: Έρχεται μια τουρίστρια από την Ισπανία.
translations.nb: Der kommer en turist fra Spania.
translations.id: Seorang turis dari Spanyol sedang datang.
translations.sv: Här kommer en turist från Spanien.
translations.da: Der kommer en turist fra Spanien.
translations.ja: スペインからの観光客がやって来ます。

tokens.explanation: Deictic adverb setting a spatial/temporal frame; occupies the initial field in V2 word order.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; verb-second position after initial 'Da'; subject follows the verb.
Indefinite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner for 'Touristin'.
Common noun, feminine, nominative singular; grammatical subject of 'kommt'.
Preposition governing dative; marks origin/source.
Proper noun (country), dative singular; object of the preposition 'aus' indicating origin.

sentences.target: Wir machen ein Foto für die Touristin.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈmaxən aɪ̯n ˈfoːto fyːɐ̯ diː tuˈʁɪstɪn/

translations.de: Wir machen ein Foto für die Touristin.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈmaxən aɪ̯n ˈfoːto fyːɐ̯ diː tuˈʁɪstɪn/
translations.en: We’re taking a photo for the tourist.
translations.es: Le hacemos una foto a la turista.
translations.fr: On prend une photo pour la touriste.
translations.it: Scattiamo una foto per la turista.
translations.ko: 우리가 그 관광객을 위해 사진을 찍어 주고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在帮那位女游客拍照。
translations.yue: 我哋幫嗰位女遊客影相。
translations.pt: Tiramos uma foto para a turista.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi chụp ảnh giúp du khách.
translations.nl: We maken een foto voor de toeriste.
translations.hi: हम पर्यटक के लिए फोटो खींच रहे हैं.
translations.el: Βγάζουμε μια φωτογραφία για την τουρίστρια.
translations.nb: Vi tar et bilde for turisten.
translations.id: Kami sedang memotret untuk turis itu.
translations.sv: Vi tar en bild åt turisten.
translations.da: Vi tager et billede for turisten.
translations.ja: 観光客のために写真を撮っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person plural; takes a direct object ('ein Foto') and a beneficiary PP ('für die Touristin').
Indefinite article, accusative neuter singular; determiner for 'Foto'.
Common noun, neuter, accusative singular; direct object of 'machen'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a beneficiary PP.
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; determiner for 'Touristin'.
Common noun, feminine, accusative singular; object of the preposition 'für' (beneficiary).
